records.rawExplanation:
*2021 (post-IPO SaaS-mania peak):* stock ¥3,940 (Mar 25) – ¥9,190 (Sep 6) per Nikkei; year-end close ¥6,920 (no prior-year-close reference for clean YoY). **FY11/2021 actual: revenue ¥15,633M, operating loss ¥(1,062)M, net loss ¥(1,548)M** per Tempest cache (verified against irbank.net to within rounding). Stock-move catalyst: 2021 SaaS-mania wave + Money Forward's hypergrowth + deliberate growth-investment narrative (front-loaded SG&A on customer-account expansion and platform features). Sign summary: revenue rose strongly on SaaS hypergrowth; operating loss sustained on deliberate strategic investment; shares rallied to all-time high ¥9,190 (Sep 6). 業績 ◎ (revenue with deliberate-investment loss) / 株価 ◎ (mania-pricing-driven ATH).

<<CANONICAL FY2021>>
業績_sign: ◎
株価_sign: ◎

net_dir: down

records.rawExplanation:
*2022 (post-mania derating):* stock ¥2,781 (Jul 19) – ¥6,970 (Jan 4); year-end close ¥4,070 (−41.2% YoY). Jan 4 ¥6,970 was a hangover from the Sept 2021 peak; the year then de-rated steadily through Jul 19 ¥2,781 trough. **FY11/2022 actual: revenue ¥21,477M (+37.4% YoY), operating loss ¥(8,469)M (loss widened from ¥(1,062)M), net loss ¥(8,766)M** per Tempest cache (rev/OP match irbank; irbank NP is ¥(8,766)M, same). Stock-move catalyst for the close −41% derating: 2022 global growth-stock + SaaS-multiple compression (same pattern hit PLAID 2022, SHIFT 2022, Rakus 2022); MF's PER-on-revenue multiple compressed even as ARR continued growing. Sign summary: revenue rose +37.4% YoY on continued strong growth; operating loss widened on deliberate strategic investment in SMB customer acquisition + mid-market expansion; shares fell sharply to ¥2,781 multi-year low (Jul 19). 業績 ◎ (revenue growing on deliberate-investment loss-widening) / 株価 ✕ (close −41.2% YoY).

<<CANONICAL FY2022>>

株価_sign: ✕

records.rawExplanation:
*2023 (revenue compounding, stock stays de-rated, インボイス tailwind emerges):* stock ¥3,367 (Oct 26) – ¥6,487 (Jun 19); year-end close ¥4,322 (+6.2% YoY). **FY11/2023 actual: revenue ¥30,381M (+41.4% YoY), operating loss ¥(6,330)M (loss narrowed from ¥(8,469)M), net loss ¥(5,659)M per irbank.net; Tempest reports net loss ¥(6,332)M** — discrepancy carried explicitly. Stock-move catalyst: continued ARR hypergrowth; インボイス制度 (invoice system) rollout announced October 2023 drove SaaS-marketing-services demand for MF's invoice products — earnings-call coverage from this period (logmi-finance) cited SaaS ARR +40% YoY breaking ¥20B on the インボイス制度 tailwind. Stock range-bound through 2023 — close +6.2% modest. Sign summary: revenue rose +41.4% YoY; operating loss narrowed (improvement); インボイス制度 rollout drove SaaS ARR acceleration; shares range-bound (close +6.2%, well below 2021 ATH ¥9,190). 業績 ◎ (revenue accelerating + OP loss narrowing) / 株価 ✕ (close ¥4,322 still well below 2021 ATH; only modest recovery).

<<CANONICAL FY2023>>

records.rawExplanation:
*2024 (EBITDA Q1 turn-to-black — analyst real-time descriptive lag check):* stock ¥3,972 (Jan 5) – ¥6,947 (Mar 4); year-end close ¥4,831 (+11.8% YoY). **FY11/2024 actual: revenue ¥40,364M (+32.9% YoY), operating loss ¥(4,735)M (loss narrowed from ¥(6,330)M), net loss ¥(6,632)M per irbank; Tempest reports net loss ¥(6,300)M.** Per logmi-finance earnings-call coverage (Q1 FY11/2024 results, announced mid-2024): **Q1 FY11/2024 was the first quarter with EBITDA turn-to-black (¥530M EBITDA-positive)**, identified by analysts and management IN-QUARTER as the inflection point. Full-year FY11/2024 EBITDA ¥1.73B, margin improvement of +11pt. **Forward signaling at FY11/2024 announcement: management targeted full-year operating profit turn-to-black by FY11/2026; FY28 plan: revenue ¥100B / EBITDA ¥30B+.** Sign summary: revenue rose +32.9% YoY; operating loss narrowed +¥1.6B; EBITDA turned positive at Q1, full-year EBITDA ¥1.73B; SaaS ARR +30% YoY to ¥30B; shares modestly higher (close +11.8% YoY, range-bound between ¥4-7K). 業績 ◎ (revenue accelerating + EBITDA inflection identified in-quarter + multiple records) / 株価 ✕ (close +11.8% modest; still well below 2021 ATH).

<<CANONICAL FY2024>>

records.rawExplanation:
*2025 (first-ever NP positive — operational inflection delivered, stock ambivalent):* stock ¥3,330 (Apr 9) – ¥6,794 (Aug 19); year-end close ¥4,668 (−3.4% YoY). **FY11/2025 actual (announced January 2026 — POST-calendar-window): revenue ¥50,350M (+24.7% YoY), operating loss ¥(2,653)M (loss narrowed from ¥(4,735)M), net profit ¥1,587M per senior-verified primary source (FIRST-EVER FULL-YEAR NET PROFIT IN COMPANY HISTORY)**; irbank.net reports NP ¥2,463M (consolidated vs parent-attributable line-item difference); Tempest reports profit ¥1,587M matching senior. Operating loss continued to narrow; net profit turn-to-black achieved on a combination of operating-loss narrowing + one-off positive non-operating items per management commentary. Stock action during calendar 2025: massive intra-year recovery (+104% from Apr 9 low ¥3,330 to Aug 19 high ¥6,794) on quarterly trajectory data as Q1/Q2/Q3 results showed continued ARR growth + operating-loss narrowing — but stock gave back gains by year-end (close ¥4,668, −3.4% YoY) suggesting market skepticism about durability of the inflection. Sign summary: revenue rose +24.7% YoY; operating loss narrowed +¥2.1B; **net profit first-ever positive ¥1,587M from prior net loss ¥6,331M**; shares had +104% mid-year rally (Apr → Aug) on quarterly inflection signal then gave back gains (close −3.4% YoY). 業績 ◎ (NP first-ever positive + revenue acceleration + OP loss narrowing) / 株価 mixed (close down −3.4% YoY but mid-year +104% rally; year-end ambivalent on inflection durability).

<<CANONICAL FY2025>>
業績_sign: ◎
株価_sign: mixed
revenue_dir: up
op_dir: up
net_dir: up

Cautious side: irbank.net and Tempest report slightly different NP figures for FY11/2022-2025 (consistent ~¥0.4-0.9B gap), likely a line-item difference (consolidated current-period profit vs parent-attributable net profit). The senior-verified ¥1,587M FY11/2025 NP from the primary 短信 is the load-bearing figure for the first-ever-positive claim. Operating-loss line is identical across sources; revenue is identical. The 株価 mixed call for 2025 is honest writer judgment — close down but mid-year rally was substantial, and the 株価 unclassified outcome is the expected discipline outcome (canonical block surfaces as unclassified + split_ambiguous, the system flags for human review).

- https://finance.logmi.jp/articles/379416 (Q1 FY11/2024 EBITDA turn-to-black announcement coverage, mid-2024)
- https://finance.logmi.jp/articles/380983 (FY11/2024 full-year results coverage, January 2025)
- https://finance.logmi.jp/articles/378626 (SaaS ARR +40% / インボイス制度 tailwind coverage)
